name: Flare Fair
description: Flare Fair: DeFi Gamified. Flare Fair is a multi-phased campaign within a digital theme park of interconnected zones. Fun Zones are the core of the virtual fair, it aggregates the introduction of each dapp, the tutorial videos and are each associated with their incentivized actions. Each phase of the campaign will bring new dApps and tasks for users. Participation in the Fair activities makes participants eligible for rewards (such as rFLR, Flaredrops) when there will also be additional rewards in Layer3.
